message:
feat(core): deterministic event_id.v1 + merge ordering + clock anomaly detection (wa-zn2u)

Implements the sequence-correlation-model.md spec primitives:
- StreamKind enum with rank-based Ord (lifecycle < control < ingress < egress)
- generate_event_id_v1(): SHA-256 deterministic event identity
- RecorderMergeKey: 5-key total ordering for cross-pane merge
- ClockAnomalyTracker: per-domain regression + future-skew detection

31 tests covering all components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
